name: ExtensionMedicinalProductDefinition_Status
title: R5: The status within the lifecycle of this product record (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `MedicinalProductDefinition.status` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`MedicinalProductDefinition.status` 0..1 `CodeableConcept`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `MedicinalProductDefinition.status` 0..1 `CodeableConcept`
*  R4B: `MedicinalProductDefinition.status` 0..1 `CodeableConcept`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `MedicinalProductDefinition.status` has a context of MedicinalProduct based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `MedicinalProduct`.
Element `MedicinalProductDefinition.status` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: The status within the lifecycle of this product record (new)
element.comment:
Element `MedicinalProductDefinition.status` has a context of MedicinalProduct based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `MedicinalProduct`.
Element `MedicinalProductDefinition.status` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
element.isModifierReason: This element is labelled as a modifier because it is a status element that can indicate that a record should not be treated as valid

element.short: The status within the lifecycle of this product record
element.definition: The status within the lifecycle of this product record. A high-level status, this is not intended to duplicate details carried elsewhere such as legal status, or authorization status.

binding.description: The lifecycle status of an artifact.
